utility_evaluation.REASONING:
There are 7 items requested in the final format: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. All 7 appear in the final package. Check full specification per item: 
- destination: Provided (Athens, Greece) – fully specified.
- travel_dates: Specific dates provided (July 1-5, 2024) – fully specified.
- transportation: Flight details with costs – airline class, route, dates/times, booking reference, and cost (€120) included – fully specified.
- accommodation: Hotel selection with costs – hotel name, address, check-in/out, booking reference, and cost (€450). Note: Duration says 5 nights though dates imply 4 nights, but cost and details are present; still counts as specified.
- activities: Selected activities with costs – 3 activities with dates, costs, and booking refs; total activities cost (€205) – fully specified.
- additional_services: Extra services with costs – restaurant reservations with locations/dates and total meal budget (€305) – fully specified.
- total_budget: Complete cost breakdown – itemized flights, accommodation, activities, meals, and grand total (€1,080) – fully specified.
Thus, 7/7 items are included and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: From the final package: Destination is 'Athens, Greece' which matches the destinations list. Transportation is 'Budget Airlines Economy flights' which maps to transportation.budget_airlines.Economy Class. Accommodation is 'Eco Lodge Athens' which maps to accommodation.Eco Lodge. Activities include Rock Climbing, Scuba Diving Excursion, and Hiking Expedition—these map directly to activities.Rock Climbing, activities.Scuba Diving Excursion, and activities.Hiking Expedition. Restaurants include 'Gluten-Free Eatery' and 'Organic Farm-to-Table' which map to restaurants.Gluten-Free Eatery and restaurants.Organic Farm-to-Table.
